To establish air bases in Belgium

An operation to supply occupied Europe
A secret mission to rescue Allied prisoners
The secret program to develop the atomic bomb

questions.q: Which British mathematician and logician played a crucial role in deciphering the Enigma machine at Bletchley Park?

choices: Mobile killing squads tasked with mass executions of civilians and Jews
Anti-aircraft defense regiments for protecting Wehrmacht convoys
Elite commando units for sabotage operations behind Soviet lines

questions.q: In which year did the Soviet Union enter the war against Japan, fulfilling commitments made at the Yalta Conference?

choices: Large-scale airborne assault using paratroopers and gliders
Amphibious landing coordinated with naval bombardment
Combined arms attack with tanks and motorized infantry

questions.q: Which American general commanded the Pacific Theater strategy based on 'island hopping' to isolate and bypass Japanese strongholds?
The Lend-Lease Act of 1941 primarily authorized the United States to do what?
choices: Finance the construction of the atomic bomb
Establish military bases in neutral European countries
Provide military supplies and equipment to Britain and the Soviet Union without immediate payment
Declare war on Nazi Germany and the Axis powers

questions.q: The Warsaw Ghetto Uprising in 1943 was primarily a Jewish resistance operation against which occupying force?
choices: Nazi German forces and the Gestapo

questions.q: The German pocket battleship that was scuttled in the Rio de la Plata estuary in December 1939 was the Admiral Graf Spee. What event preceded its sinking?
choices: Bombardment by British naval forces in the Battle of the River Plate
Capture by American naval forces in the Atlantic
Ramming by a Soviet icebreaker in Arctic waters
Accidental explosion in dry dock during repairs

questions.q: The Tuskegee Airmen were the first African American military aviation unit in the U.S. Armed Forces. In what year was the program established?
Which British counterintelligence operation successfully convinced Nazi Germany that the D-Day invasion would occur at Pas-de-Calais rather than Normandy?
The Battle of the Atlantic was primarily a conflict between German U-boats and which Allied naval convoy system?
choices: Allied merchant convoys supplying Britain from North America
British supply convoys to North Africa
American supply ships to the Soviet Union
